title: ranunculus subinermis
intro: Ranunculus subinermis is a perennial plant species in the family Ranunculaceae, commonly known as the small-flowered buttercup or small-flowered crowfoot. The plant contains compounds like ranunculin, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Ranunculus subinermis is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
